name: Qwen Tiny Offline
description: Root ZIP preset for h3 local ai. Tiny offline helper tuned for weak Chromebooks.
corpus: qwen tiny offline root zip is a small local preset for this html app
real qwen weights are larger and need a heavier runtime than a single html file
a four gigabyte chromebook works best with small prompts small packs and low output length
offline ai should keep prompts answers and packs on the device whenever possible
this root zip lets the app point to a real file in the project root when fetch is allowed
if root zip loading fails the app should fall back to the embedded preset and stay usable

qwen: This is the root ZIP version of the tiny Qwen-style preset. It is still lightweight and local-first.
The app will prefer this root ZIP when it can fetch local assets, then fall back to the embedded preset if needed.
offline: This preset is meant for offline use after the files are already on your device.
For the cleanest offline setup, keep the HTML and these ZIPs together in the project root.
